---
title: "InitialWorkflow"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
games <- read_csv("data/combined.csv")
```

```{r}
metrics <- read_csv("data/metrics.csv") %>%
  mutate(AdjEM = AdjOE - AdjDE)

metrics_slim <- metrics %>%
  select(`Mapped ESPN Team Name`, Season, AdjOE, AdjDE, AdjEM)

games_rated <- games %>%
  left_join(metrics_slim, by = c("year" = "Season", "winning_team_name" = "Mapped ESPN Team Name")) %>%
  rename(win_AdjEM = AdjEM, win_AdjOE = AdjOE, win_AdjDE = AdjDE) %>%
  left_join(metrics_slim, by = c("year" = "Season", "losing_team_name" = "Mapped ESPN Team Name")) %>%
  rename(lose_AdjEM = AdjEM, lose_AdjOE = AdjOE, lose_AdjDE = AdjDE)

games_rated <- games_rated %>%
  mutate(round = case_when(
    round_of == 64 ~ 1, round_of == 32 ~ 2, round_of == 16 ~ 3,
    round_of ==  8 ~ 4, round_of ==  4 ~ 5, round_of ==  2 ~ 6
  ))

```

```{r}
# Build modeling dataset: reframe so each row is a matchup with a binary outcome
model_data <- games_rated %>%
  filter(!is.na(win_AdjEM), !is.na(lose_AdjEM)) %>%
  mutate(
    # From the stronger seed's perspective
    s1 = pmin(winning_team_seed, losing_team_seed),
    s2 = pmax(winning_team_seed, losing_team_seed),
    s1_won = (winning_team_seed == s1),
    # AdjEM difference from stronger seed's perspective
    em_diff = ifelse(s1_won,
                     win_AdjEM - lose_AdjEM,
                     lose_AdjEM - win_AdjEM)
  )

# Fit logistic regression: P(stronger seed wins) ~ AdjEM difference
fit <- glm(s1_won ~ em_diff, data = model_data, family = binomial)
summary(fit)
```

```{r}
# Average AdjEM by seed (among tournament teams)
seed_ratings <- metrics %>%
  filter(!is.na(Seed)) %>%
  group_by(Seed) %>%
  summarise(mean_AdjEM = mean(AdjEM, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Build 16x16x6 probability matrix using logistic model
build_logistic_prob_matrix <- function(seed_ratings, fit) {
  mat <- array(0.5, dim = c(16, 16, 6))
  for (s1 in 1:16) {
    for (s2 in 1:16) {
      if (s1 == s2) next
      em1 <- seed_ratings %>% filter(Seed == s1) %>% pull(mean_AdjEM)
      em2 <- seed_ratings %>% filter(Seed == s2) %>% pull(mean_AdjEM)
      if (length(em1) == 0 || length(em2) == 0) next
      diff <- em1 - em2
      p_s1 <- predict(fit, newdata = data.frame(em_diff = diff), type = "response")
      for (rnd in 1:6) {
        mat[s1, s2, rnd] <- p_s1
      }
    }
  }
  mat
}

logistic_prob_mat <- build_logistic_prob_matrix(seed_ratings, fit)
```

```{r}
clamp <- function(x, lo, hi) pmax(lo, pmin(hi, x))
 
compute_alpha <- function(p_bar, s1, s2) {
  if (s1 == s2) return(0)
  if (p_bar >= 1) return(2)
  if (p_bar <= 0) return(-2)
  logit_p <- log(p_bar / (1 - p_bar))
  alpha <- logit_p / (log(1/s1) - log(1/s2))
  clamp(alpha, -2, 2)
}
 
power_model_prob <- function(alpha, s1, s2) {
  if (s1 == s2) return(0.5)
  s2^alpha / (s1^alpha + s2^alpha)
}
 
build_power_model <- function(data, train_years) {
  train <- data %>%
    filter(year %in% train_years) %>%
    mutate(
      s1 = pmin(winning_team_seed, losing_team_seed),
      s2 = pmax(winning_team_seed, losing_team_seed),
      s1_won = (winning_team_seed == s1)
    )
  
  # Round 1: matchup-specific alphas
  r1 <- train %>%
    filter(round == 1) %>%
    group_by(s1, s2) %>%
    summarise(p_bar = mean(s1_won), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(alpha = compute_alpha(p_bar, s1, s2)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Rounds 2-6: weighted average alpha per round
  later <- train %>%
    filter(round >= 2, s1 != s2) %>%
    group_by(round, s1, s2) %>%
    summarise(p_bar = mean(s1_won), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(alpha = compute_alpha(p_bar, s1, s2)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  round_alphas <- later %>%
    group_by(round) %>%
    summarise(alpha_bar = weighted.mean(alpha, w = n), .groups = "drop")
  
  list(r1_alphas = r1, round_alphas = round_alphas)
}
 
# --- Build 16x16x6 probability lookup matrix ---------------------------------
# This is the key optimization: one matrix lookup per game instead of dplyr filter
 
build_prob_matrix <- function(model) {
  # prob_mat[s1, s2, round] = P(s1 beats s2) for s1 < s2 (stronger seed)
  # For s1 > s2, use 1 - prob_mat[s2, s1, round]
  # For s1 == s2, use 0.5
  mat <- array(0.5, dim = c(16, 16, 6))
  
  # Get round-level alphas (rounds 2-6)
  round_alpha_lookup <- rep(1, 6)  # default
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(model$round_alphas))) {
    rnd <- model$round_alphas$round[i]
    round_alpha_lookup[rnd] <- model$round_alphas$alpha_bar[i]
  }
  
  # Build Round 1 lookup from matchup-specific alphas
  r1 <- model$r1_alphas
  # First, set all Round 1 entries using a default alpha
  # (in case a matchup hasn't been observed)
  default_r1_alpha <- if (1 %in% model$round_alphas$round) {
    model$round_alphas %>% filter(round == 1) %>% pull(alpha_bar)
  } else {
    1.0
  }
  if (length(default_r1_alpha) == 0) default_r1_alpha <- 1.0
  
  for (s1 in 1:15) {
    for (s2 in (s1+1):16) {
      # Round 1: check for matchup-specific alpha
      row <- r1 %>% filter(.data$s1 == !!s1, .data$s2 == !!s2)
      if (nrow(row) > 0) {
        alpha <- row$alpha[1]
      } else {
        alpha <- default_r1_alpha
      }
      p <- power_model_prob(alpha, s1, s2)
      mat[s1, s2, 1] <- p
      mat[s2, s1, 1] <- 1 - p
      
      # Rounds 2-6: use round-level alpha
      for (rnd in 2:6) {
        p <- power_model_prob(round_alpha_lookup[rnd], s1, s2)
        mat[s1, s2, rnd] <- p
        mat[s2, s1, rnd] <- 1 - p
      }
    }
  }
  
  mat
}
```

```{r}
# Region bracket pairings (standard NCAA bracket order)
REGION_SEEDS <- matrix(c(
  1, 16,  8, 9,  5, 12,  4, 13,
  6, 11,  3, 14, 7, 10,  2, 15
), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE)
 
# Simulate one game using the pre-computed matrix
sim_game <- function(seed_a, seed_b, rnd, prob_mat) {
  p_a <- prob_mat[seed_a, seed_b, rnd]  # P(seed_a wins)
  if (runif(1) < p_a) seed_a else seed_b
}
 
# Simulate a full region (rounds 1-4), returns list of winners per round
simulate_region <- function(prob_mat) {
  # Round 1: 8 games
  r1 <- integer(8)
  for (i in 1:8) {
    r1[i] <- sim_game(REGION_SEEDS[i, 1], REGION_SEEDS[i, 2], 1L, prob_mat)
  }
  # Round 2: 4 games
  r2 <- integer(4)
  for (i in 1:4) {
    r2[i] <- sim_game(r1[2*i - 1], r1[2*i], 2L, prob_mat)
  }
  # Round 3: 2 games
  r3 <- integer(2)
  r3[1] <- sim_game(r2[1], r2[2], 3L, prob_mat)
  r3[2] <- sim_game(r2[3], r2[4], 3L, prob_mat)
  # Round 4: 1 game
  r4 <- sim_game(r3[1], r3[2], 4L, prob_mat)
  
  list(r1 = r1, r2 = r2, r3 = r3, r4 = r4)
}
 
# Simulate full bracket
simulate_bracket <- function(prob_mat) {
  reg <- lapply(1:4, function(i) simulate_region(prob_mat))
  f4 <- c(reg[[1]]$r4, reg[[2]]$r4, reg[[3]]$r4, reg[[4]]$r4)
  f4w <- c(sim_game(f4[1], f4[2], 5L, prob_mat),
           sim_game(f4[3], f4[4], 5L, prob_mat))
  champ <- sim_game(f4w[1], f4w[2], 6L, prob_mat)
  list(regions = reg, f4_seeds = f4, f4_winners = f4w, champion = champ)
}
```

```{r}
# R64: basic, simulate everything from Round 1
gen_R64 <- function(prob_mat) {
  simulate_bracket(prob_mat)
}
 
# Pick Favorite: deterministic, always pick the stronger seed
gen_PF <- function() {
  reg <- lapply(1:4, function(i) {
    r1 <- pmin(REGION_SEEDS[, 1], REGION_SEEDS[, 2])
    r2 <- integer(4)
    for (j in 1:4) r2[j] <- min(r1[2*j - 1], r1[2*j])
    r3 <- c(min(r2[1], r2[2]), min(r2[3], r2[4]))
    r4 <- min(r3[1], r3[2])
    list(r1 = r1, r2 = r2, r3 = r3, r4 = r4)
  })
  f4 <- sapply(reg, function(r) r$r4)
  f4w <- c(min(f4[1], f4[2]), min(f4[3], f4[4]))
  list(regions = reg, f4_seeds = f4, f4_winners = f4w, champion = min(f4w))
}
 
# Truncated geometric sampler
sample_trunc_geom <- function(n, q, imax = 16) {
  probs <- q * (1 - q)^(0:(imax - 1))
  probs <- probs / sum(probs)
  sample.int(imax, size = n, replace = TRUE, prob = probs)
}
 
# F4A: anchor at Final Four — sample 4 F4 seeds, simulate last 3 games
gen_F4A <- function(prob_mat, q_f4) {
  f4 <- sample_trunc_geom(4, q_f4)
  # Simulate regions normally for early-round scoring
  reg <- lapply(1:4, function(i) {
    r <- simulate_region(prob_mat)
    r$r4 <- f4[i]  # override region winner
    r
  })
  f4w <- c(sim_game(f4[1], f4[2], 5L, prob_mat),
           sim_game(f4[3], f4[4], 5L, prob_mat))
  champ <- sim_game(f4w[1], f4w[2], 6L, prob_mat)
  list(regions = reg, f4_seeds = f4, f4_winners = f4w, champion = champ)
}
 
# E8: anchor at Elite Eight — sample 2 E8 seeds per region, simulate from there
gen_E8 <- function(prob_mat, q_e8) {
  reg <- lapply(1:4, function(i) {
    r <- simulate_region(prob_mat)
    e8 <- sample_trunc_geom(2, q_e8)
    r$r3 <- e8  # override S16 winners
    r$r4 <- sim_game(e8[1], e8[2], 4L, prob_mat)
    r
  })
  f4 <- sapply(reg, function(r) r$r4)
  f4w <- c(sim_game(f4[1], f4[2], 5L, prob_mat),
           sim_game(f4[3], f4[4], 5L, prob_mat))
  champ <- sim_game(f4w[1], f4w[2], 6L, prob_mat)
  list(regions = reg, f4_seeds = f4, f4_winners = f4w, champion = champ)
}
 
# NCG: anchor at championship — sample 2 NCG seeds, simulate the final
gen_NCG <- function(prob_mat, q_ncg) {
  ncg <- sample_trunc_geom(2, q_ncg)
  reg <- lapply(1:4, function(i) simulate_region(prob_mat))
  f4 <- sapply(reg, function(r) r$r4)
  f4w <- ncg  # override F4 winners
  champ <- sim_game(ncg[1], ncg[2], 6L, prob_mat)
  list(regions = reg, f4_seeds = f4, f4_winners = f4w, champion = champ)
}
```

```{r}
ESPN_POINTS <- c(10L, 20L, 40L, 80L, 160L, 320L)
 
# Pre-extract actual results for a year as simple integer vectors
# Returns a list of 6 integer vectors (one per round), each containing
# the winning seeds for that round
precompute_actual <- function(data, target_year) {
  actual <- data %>% filter(year == target_year)
  round_of_map <- c(64, 32, 16, 8, 4, 2)
  lapply(1:6, function(rnd) {
    sort(actual %>% filter(round_of == round_of_map[rnd]) %>% pull(winning_team_seed))
  })
}
 
# Fast multiset match count using sorted integer vectors
count_matches_fast <- function(sim_seeds, actual_seeds) {
  # Use table-based matching on small integer vectors
  sim_t <- tabulate(sim_seeds, nbins = 16)
  act_t <- tabulate(actual_seeds, nbins = 16)
  sum(pmin(sim_t, act_t))
}
 
# Score a bracket against pre-computed actuals
score_bracket_fast <- function(bracket, actual_rounds) {
  score <- 0L
  
  # Rounds 1-3 (within regions)
  for (rnd in 1:3) {
    field <- c("r1", "r2", "r3")[rnd]
    sim <- unlist(lapply(bracket$regions, function(r) r[[field]]))
    score <- score + count_matches_fast(sim, actual_rounds[[rnd]]) * ESPN_POINTS[rnd]
  }
  
  # Round 4 (E8)
  sim_r4 <- sapply(bracket$regions, function(r) r$r4)
  score <- score + count_matches_fast(sim_r4, actual_rounds[[4]]) * ESPN_POINTS[4]
  
  # Round 5 (F4)
  score <- score + count_matches_fast(bracket$f4_winners, actual_rounds[[5]]) * ESPN_POINTS[5]
  
  # Round 6 (NCG)
  score <- score + count_matches_fast(bracket$champion, actual_rounds[[6]]) * ESPN_POINTS[6]
  
  score
}
```

```{r}
run_experiment <- function(data, test_year, N = 1000, R = 10) {
  cat("Year:", test_year, "\n")
  
  train_years <- setdiff(2002:(test_year - 1), 2020)
  train_years <- train_years[train_years %in% unique(data$year)]
  
  # Power model matrix (existing)
  model <- build_power_model(data, train_years)
  prob_mat <- build_prob_matrix(model)
  
  # Logistic model matrix (new)
  train_data_rated <- data %>%
    filter(year %in% train_years, !is.na(win_AdjEM), !is.na(lose_AdjEM)) %>%
    mutate(
      s1 = pmin(winning_team_seed, losing_team_seed),
      s2 = pmax(winning_team_seed, losing_team_seed),
      s1_won = (winning_team_seed == s1),
      em_diff = ifelse(s1_won, win_AdjEM - lose_AdjEM, lose_AdjEM - win_AdjEM)
    )
  
  fit <- glm(s1_won ~ em_diff, data = train_data_rated, family = binomial)
  
  seed_ratings <- metrics_slim %>%
    filter(Season %in% train_years) %>%
    mutate(Seed = as.integer(str_extract(`Mapped ESPN Team Name`, "\\d+")))
    # ^ that won't work — you need seed info. Use this instead:
  
  # Get average AdjEM per seed from training tournament teams
  seed_ratings <- data %>%
    filter(year %in% train_years, !is.na(win_AdjEM)) %>%
    select(year, Seed = winning_team_seed, AdjEM = win_AdjEM) %>%
    bind_rows(
      data %>%
        filter(year %in% train_years, !is.na(lose_AdjEM)) %>%
        select(year, Seed = losing_team_seed, AdjEM = lose_AdjEM)
    ) %>%
    group_by(Seed) %>%
    summarise(mean_AdjEM = mean(AdjEM), .groups = "drop")
  
  logistic_prob_mat <- build_logistic_prob_matrix(seed_ratings, fit)
  
  # Pre-compute actuals (existing)
  actual <- precompute_actual(data, test_year)
  
  # Truncated geometric params (existing)
  train_games <- data %>% filter(year %in% train_years)
  q_f4  <- 1 / mean(train_games %>% filter(round == 4) %>% pull(winning_team_seed))
  q_e8  <- 1 / mean(train_games %>% filter(round == 3) %>% pull(winning_team_seed))
  q_ncg <- 1 / mean(train_games %>% filter(round == 5) %>% pull(winning_team_seed))
  
  # Add Logistic generator to the list
  generators <- list(
  # Power model generators
  Power_R64 = function() gen_R64(prob_mat),
  Power_E8  = function() gen_E8(prob_mat, q_e8),
  Power_F4A = function() gen_F4A(prob_mat, q_f4),
  
  # Logistic model generators
  Log_R64   = function() gen_R64(logistic_prob_mat),
  Log_E8    = function() gen_E8(logistic_prob_mat, q_e8),
  Log_F4A   = function() gen_F4A(logistic_prob_mat, q_f4),
  
  # Baseline
  PickFav   = function() gen_PF()
)
  
  results <- vector("list", length(generators))
  names(results) <- names(generators)
  
  for (gen_name in names(generators)) {
    t0 <- Sys.time()
    gen_fn <- generators[[gen_name]]
    
    rep_max_scores <- numeric(R)
    all_scores     <- numeric(N * R)
    
    for (rep in 1:R) {
      offset <- (rep - 1) * N
      best <- 0L
      for (i in 1:N) {
        b <- gen_fn()
        s <- score_bracket_fast(b, actual)
        all_scores[offset + i] <- s
        if (s > best) best <- s
      }
      rep_max_scores[rep] <- best
    }
    
    elapsed <- round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t0, units = "secs")), 1)
    cat("  ", gen_name, ":", elapsed, "sec\n")
    
    results[[gen_name]] <- tibble(
      generator      = gen_name,
      year           = test_year,
      max_score_mean = mean(rep_max_scores),
      max_score_sd   = sd(rep_max_scores),
      mean_score     = mean(all_scores),
      median_score   = median(all_scores),
      scores         = list(all_scores),
      max_scores     = list(rep_max_scores)
    )
  }
  
  bind_rows(results)
}
```

```{r}
# --- Run experiments ---------------------------------------------------------
test_years <- c(2017, 2018, 2019, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024)
 
# START HERE for debugging — fast run
N_brackets <- 500
R_reps     <- 5
 
# SCALE UP for final report — uncomment these:
# N_brackets <- 5000
# R_reps     <- 25
 
cat("=== Bracket Generation Experiments ===\n")
cat("Settings: N =", N_brackets, ", R =", R_reps,
    ", Years =", length(test_years), "\n")
cat("Total brackets:", N_brackets * R_reps * length(test_years) * 5, "\n\n")
 
t_start <- Sys.time()
all_results <- map_dfr(test_years, function(yr) {
  run_experiment(games_rated, yr, N = N_brackets, R = R_reps)
})
t_total <- round(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), t_start, units = "secs")), 1)
cat("\nTotal time:", t_total, "seconds\n")
```

```{r}
# --- 7A: Max Score Table (reproduces paper's Table 6) ------------------------
max_score_table <- all_results %>%
  select(generator, year, max_score_mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = generator, values_from = max_score_mean)
 
knitr::kable(max_score_table, digits = 0,
             caption = "Average Max Score by Generator and Year")
 
# --- 7B: Max Score Grouped Bar Chart -----------------------------------------
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = factor(year), y = max_score_mean, fill = generator)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = max_score_mean - max_score_sd,
        ymax = max_score_mean + max_score_sd),
    position = position_dodge(0.9), width = 0.25
  ) +
  labs(title = "Average Max Score by Generator and Tournament Year",
       x = "Year", y = "Avg Max Score (ESPN)", fill = "Generator") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")
 
# --- 7C: Score Distributions (density, one example year) ---------------------
example_yr <- 2019
 
year_scores <- all_results %>%
  filter(year == example_yr) %>%
  select(generator, scores) %>%
  unnest(scores)
 
ggplot(year_scores, aes(x = scores, fill = generator)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.35) +
  labs(title = paste("Bracket Score Distributions,", example_yr, "Tournament"),
       x = "ESPN Score", y = "Density", fill = "Generator") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")
 
# --- 7D: Score Distribution Histograms (faceted) -----------------------------
ggplot(year_scores, aes(x = scores)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 50, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~generator, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = paste("Score Histograms by Generator,", example_yr),
       x = "ESPN Score", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
 
# --- 7E: Power Model Alpha Values -------------------------------------------
full_model <- build_power_model(games_rated, setdiff(1985:2023, 2020))
 
# Round 1 matchup-specific alphas
ggplot(full_model$r1_alphas,
       aes(x = reorder(paste0(s1, "v", s2), -alpha), y = alpha)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Round 1 α-Values by Seed Matchup",
       subtitle = "Higher α → stronger seed more dominant; negative → weaker seed favored",
       x = "Matchup", y = "α") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
 
# Weighted average alpha by round
ggplot(full_model$round_alphas, aes(x = factor(round), y = alpha_bar)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral") +
  labs(title = "Weighted Average α by Round (Rounds 2–6)",
       subtitle = "Low α in Round 4 (E8) → upsets common; high α in Round 6 → chalk",
       x = "Round", y = "α̂ (weighted avg)") +
  theme_minimal()
 
# --- 7F: Historical Upset Rates by Round (EDA) -------------------------------
upset_rates <- games_rated %>%
  mutate(upset = (winning_team_seed > losing_team_seed)) %>%
  group_by(round) %>%
  summarise(
    n_games = n(), n_upsets = sum(upset),
    upset_rate = n_upsets / n_games, .groups = "drop"
  )
 
ggplot(upset_rates, aes(x = factor(round), y = upset_rate)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral") +
  geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(upset_rate, accuracy = 0.1)), vjust = -0.3) +
  labs(title = "Historical Upset Rate by Round (1985–present)",
       x = "Round (1 = R64, ..., 6 = NCG)", y = "Upset Rate") +
  theme_minimal() + ylim(0, 0.55)
 
# --- 7G: Proportion Beating Pick Favorite ------------------------------------
pf_scores <- all_results %>%
  filter(generator == "PickFav") %>%
  select(year, pf_max = max_score_mean)
 
beat_pf <- all_results %>%
  filter(generator != "PickFav") %>%
  left_join(pf_scores, by = "year") %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(prop_beat_pf = mean(unlist(scores) >= pf_max)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(generator, year, prop_beat_pf)
 
ggplot(beat_pf, aes(x = factor(year), y = prop_beat_pf,
                    color = generator, group = generator)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(title = "Proportion of Brackets Beating Pick Favorite",
       x = "Year", y = "Proportion", color = "Generator") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2")
 
# --- 7H: Final Four Seed Distribution (Truncated Geometric Fit) ---------------
f4_seeds_actual <- games_rated %>%
  filter(round == 4) %>%
  pull(winning_team_seed)
 
q_hat <- 1 / mean(f4_seeds_actual)
tg_pmf <- q_hat * (1 - q_hat)^(0:15)
tg_pmf <- tg_pmf / sum(tg_pmf)
 
f4_fit <- tibble(
  seed = 1:16,
  observed = sapply(1:16, function(s) sum(f4_seeds_actual == s)),
  expected = tg_pmf * length(f4_seeds_actual)
) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(observed, expected), names_to = "type", values_to = "count")
 
ggplot(f4_fit, aes(x = factor(seed), y = count, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Final Four Seeds: Observed vs Truncated Geometric Fit",
       x = "Seed", y = "Count", fill = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("observed" = "steelblue", "expected" = "coral"))
 
# --- 7I: Mean Score by Generator (overall) -----------------------------------
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = generator, y = mean_score, fill = generator)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Mean Bracket Score Across Years",
       x = "Generator", y = "Mean Score per Pool") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
 
# --- 7J: Max Score Heatmap ---------------------------------------------------
all_results %>%
  select(generator, year, max_score_mean) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = generator, fill = max_score_mean)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(max_score_mean)), size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Max Score Heatmap: Generator × Year",
       x = "Year", y = "Generator", fill = "Avg Max Score") +
  theme_minimal()
```
